summary: Iteration 150: CI/CD Pipeline Integration for Sandbox Simulation - All 28 backend tests passed, frontend CICDPipelineDashboard verified with all 3 tiers working.

issues: Minor: Recharts console warning about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

critical_code_review_comments: CI/CD Pipeline Runner correctly implements 3-tier validation: PR Gate (quick subset), Staging Gate (full scenario pack), Nightly Resilience (heavy concurrency)
Acceptance criteria correctly evaluates: oversell=0, duplicate consumption=0, inconsistent state=0, stale recovery, reconciliation recovery, deterministic modify/cancel, regression vs baseline
Deploy gate verdict correctly returns PASS/BLOCK/WARN based on acceptance criteria and tier configuration
Health badges correctly separated: sandbox_validation (pr_gate), staging_deploy_validation (staging_gate), prod_health (nightly)
All /api/ops/cicd/* endpoints correctly protected by ops_guard requiring admin/operator/manager role
Frontend CICDPipelineDashboard correctly integrated into UnifiedOpsView on /control-plane page
All data-testid attributes present for testing: cicd-pipeline-dashboard, cicd-health-badges, health-badge-{tier}, cicd-trigger-{tier}, cicd-recent-runs, cicd-trend-chart
seed_data_creation: Pipeline runs created during testing stored in MongoDB collection 'cicd_pipeline_runs'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 150 verified CI/CD Pipeline Integration for sandbox simulation. Key endpoints tested: GET /api/ops/cicd/tiers (returns 3 tiers), POST /api/ops/cicd/run (triggers pipeline for pr_gate/staging_gate/nightly), GET /api/ops/cicd/runs (list recent runs), GET /api/ops/cicd/runs/{run_id} (specific run details), GET /api/ops/cicd/deploy-gate/{run_id} (gate verdict), GET /api/ops/cicd/baseline (last passing baselines), GET /api/ops/cicd/health-badges (3 separate badges), GET /api/ops/cicd/trends (trend data). All endpoints require Bearer token auth. Frontend CICDPipelineDashboard on /control-plane shows health badges, tier trigger buttons, trend chart, and recent runs.

auth_guard.notes: All /api/ops/cicd/* endpoints return 401 without token, accept valid Bearer tokens

GET /api/ops/cicd/tiers.notes: Returns 3 tiers: pr_gate (duplicate_count=3, storm_size=6, blocks_deploy=true), staging_gate (duplicate_count=5, storm_size=10, blocks_deploy=true), nightly (duplicate_count=10, storm_size=25, blocks_deploy=false)

POST /api/ops/cicd/run tier=pr_gate.notes: Returns run_id, acceptance_criteria with all required checks, deploy_gate with PASS verdict

POST /api/ops/cicd/run tier=staging_gate.notes: Returns full scenario pack with simulation_summary and provider_results

POST /api/ops/cicd/run tier=nightly.notes: Returns result with blocks_deploy=false in tier_config

GET /api/ops/cicd/runs.notes: Returns list of recent runs with total count

GET /api/ops/cicd/runs/{run_id}.notes: Returns specific run with all details including acceptance_criteria, deploy_gate, provider_results

GET /api/ops/cicd/baseline.notes: Returns last passing baseline for each tier (pr_gate, staging_gate, nightly)

GET /api/ops/cicd/health-badges.notes: Returns 3 separate badges: sandbox_validation (pr_gate), staging_deploy_validation (staging_gate), prod_health (nightly)

acceptance_criteria.notes: All required criteria present: zero_oversell, zero_duplicate_consumption, zero_inconsistent_state, stale_provider_recovery, reconciliation_recovery, deterministic_modify_cancel, zero_regression_vs_baseline

CICDPipelineDashboard.notes: Component loads on /control-plane, shows 3 health badges (PR Gate PASS 100%, Staging Gate PASS 100%, Nightly Resilience PASS 100%), 3 tier trigger buttons, Pipeline Trend chart, recent runs list

UnifiedOpsView integration.notes: CICDPipelineDashboard correctly integrated into UnifiedOpsView below KPI Dashboard section

test_classes: TestCICDAuthGuard (4 tests) - Verifies 401 without auth for tiers, runs, health-badges, run endpoints
TestCICDTiers (4 tests) - Verifies 3 tiers returned with correct configs
TestCICDRunPipeline (5 tests) - Verifies pipeline run for all tiers, invalid tier 400, acceptance criteria
TestCICDRuns (4 tests) - Verifies list runs, tier filter, specific run, 404 for nonexistent
TestCICDDeployGate (2 tests) - Verifies deploy gate verdict, 404 for nonexistent
TestCICDBaseline (1 test) - Verifies baseline per tier
TestCICDHealthBadges (3 tests) - Verifies 3 badges, structure, tier mapping
TestCICDTrends (3 tests) - Verifies trends data, structure, tier filter
TestCICDAcceptanceCriteriaValues (2 tests) - Verifies passing run criteria, severity/value fields

mocked_api_note: The sandbox simulation uses deterministic mock providers (Exely and HotelRunner harnesses). No external API calls are made. All endpoints are backed by real MongoDB queries.
